# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myVM"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "West US"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "Standard_DS2_v2"
        },
        "osDisk": {
          "createOption": "FromImage",
          "managedDisk": {
            "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
          }
        },
        "networkInterfaceConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "myNic",
            "properties": {
              "primary": true,
              "ipConfigurations": [
                {
                  "name": "internal",
                  "properties": {
                    "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
                    "subnet": {
                      "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/subnets', 'mySubnet')]"
                    }
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ],
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": {
            "publisher": "Canonical",
            "offer": "UbuntuServer",
            "sku": "16.04-LTS",
            "version": "latest"
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'myNic')]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]-publicIP",
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "mySubnet",
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'myNic')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vmName') + '-publicIP')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24",
        "privateEndpointNetworkPolicies": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "myNic",
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/subnets', 'mySubnet')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vmName') + '-publicIP')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "internal",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/subnets', 'mySubnet')]"
              }
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "public",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Static",
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vmName') + '-publicIP')]"
              },
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/subnets', 'mySubnet')]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmIpAddress": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', parameters('vmName')), '2021-04-01').networkProfile.networkInterfaces[0].ipConfigurations[1].properties.privateIPAddress]"
    }
  }
}
